test.error: PHP not installed in environment (command not found)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add PHP as a required dependency or document that backend features require a PHP runtime. Current services.yaml only documents npm commands but backend features require `php artisan` which is not available in the worker environment.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 3 backend features (demo-sqlite-setup, demo-seeder, demo-credentials-api) were blocked from running `php artisan migrate`, `php artisan db:seed`, and verification curl commands because PHP is not installed. Workers spent time investigating alternatives (nix-shell, docker) which were also unavailable.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document when `git commit --no-verify` is acceptable to bypass pre-commit hooks. Workers may need to commit work even when linting tools (like pint for PHP) are unavailable in the environment.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: demo-sqlite-setup worker used `git commit --no-verify` because pint was not found and lint-staged was failing. Current AGENTS.md documents hooks but doesn't mention acceptable bypasses.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md does not exist in mission directory
rejectedObservations.reason: AGENTS.md does exist at /home/glecomte/.factory/missions/b914dd70-5a76-479e-b9ab-da8291ab12c1/AGENTS.md - the reviewer looked at the wrong path
